auth.label: API Key
auth.description: API2PDF API key sent with the Authorization header. Sign in to the API2PDF portal to get your key: https://portal.api2pdf.com/.

actions.name: markdown_to_pdf
actions.description: Convert raw Markdown to PDF with API2PDF and return the generated PDF URL plus conversion metadata.

markdown.description: The raw Markdown content to convert to PDF.

fileName.description: An optional output PDF file name sent to API2PDF.

inline.description: Whether API2PDF should mark the generated PDF for inline display when possible.

options.description: Advanced Headless Chrome PDF options forwarded to API2PDF as-is. Use the official API2PDF option keys supported by the /chrome/pdf/markdown endpoint.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for converting raw Markdown to PDF.

anyOf.description: The temporary API2PDF URL for downloading the PDF.

success.description: Whether API2PDF reported the Markdown-to-PDF conversion as successful.

anyOf.description: The API2PDF response identifier for this conversion request.
The conversion cost in USD when returned by API2PDF.
The input size in megabytes when returned by API2PDF.
The output size in megabytes when returned by API2PDF.
The processing duration in seconds when returned by API2PDF.
The upstream API2PDF error string when one was returned.

outputSchema.description: The normalized markdown-to-PDF result returned by API2PDF.
